name: Play Kitchen - 41pc - Gigglescape™: Kids Toy Kitchen Playset, Toddler Toy, Creative Thinking, 3+ Years
description:
Engage your little one's imagination and fine motor skills with the Play Kitchen from Gigglescape™. This 41-piece play kitchen with accessories stands 41 inches tall and includes a cutting board, frying pan, utensils, seasonings and more. The doors open and the knobs turn on this light-blue and white mini kitchen, plus, they can practice sorting recycling, trash and compost in the play disposal area.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.

*Assembly Instructions Below
